page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7se.16xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs, utilizing Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at a clock speed of 2.9 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each vCPU maps directly to a dedicated physical core, eliminating resource contention from hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps, facilitating reliable data transfer rates for multi-tier architectures. No GPUs are bundled with this instance type.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and balanced resource density make this instance appropriate for workloads requiring predictable CPU execution without the premium of memory-optimized or GPU-accelerated hardware. The hardware profile is designed for enterprise applications, medium-to-large databases, web serving fleets, and containerized microservices that benefit from high core counts and a standard memory footprint.

It delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. This hardware profile is designed for workloads requiring consistent compute performance, such as enterprise applications, web serving, and containerized environments.
